name: derived-plan response prompt keeps canonical plan sections and response outcomes

openFindings.claim: Split the work into ordered scopes.
openFindings.requiredAction: Replace the vague staged rollout note with a concrete execution queue.
openFindings.roundSummary: The derived plan remains too vague.

contains: Continue refining the derived implementation plan at /tmp/DERIVED_PLAN.md for scope 3 in parent plan /tmp/PLAN.md.
Keep the same target, but make the derived plan concrete enough to replace the abandoned scope safely.
Do not silently widen the target or convert a real blocker into a vague replan.
Revise the derived plan so it uses the same Neal-executable contract as a top-level plan.
Use `fixed` only when you actually revised the plan to resolve the finding.
